---
title: "Assignment 1"
---

# Assignment 1

```{r}
1 + 1
```

My first assignment has two parts.

## (a)

data(mtcars)
compute_stats <- function(x) 
{ 
list( mean = mean(x), median = median(x), variance = var(x), IQR = IQR(x), minimum = min(x), maximum = max(x) ) 
}
## (b)

{{< https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cUPtQEyaswM&t >}}
